title: Loading spinner and message appear after submitting a valid URL
description: Verifies that submitting a valid article URL shows a visible spinning loader and descriptive loading message while analysis is running.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/sample-article" into the article URL input field
Verify element "spinning loader icon" is visible
Verify element "descriptive loading message" is visible

title: Loading state persists briefly during long-running analysis
description: Verifies that the loading spinner and message remain visible while waiting (no streaming) and do not immediately disappear after submit.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/long-form-article" into the article URL input field
Verify element "spinning loader icon" is visible
Verify element "descriptive loading message" is visible
Verify element "spinning loader icon" is visible

title: Submitting via Enter key shows loading spinner and message
description: Verifies that submitting the URL using the Enter key triggers the same loading UI as clicking Analyze.

steps.description: Click on the article URL input field
Type "https://example.com/news/submit-with-enter" into the article URL input field
Verify element "spinning loader icon" is visible
Verify element "descriptive loading message" is visible

title: Error state clears spinner and shows red error box with prefix
description: Verifies that when analysis fails, the spinner is cleared and a red error box with an "Error:" prefix is shown.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/likely-to-fail" into the article URL input field
Verify element "spinning loader icon" is visible
Wait for the red error box to appear
Verify element "spinning loader icon" is not visible

title: Loading message is visible during wait and replaced/removed after error
description: Verifies that the descriptive loading message is shown while waiting and is not left stuck on screen after an error is displayed.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/error-path" into the article URL input field
Verify element "descriptive loading message" is visible
Wait for the red error box to appear
Verify element "descriptive loading message" is not visible

title: Invalid URL shows validation error banner with details
description: Verifies that submitting an invalid URL displays a red error box with an "Error:" prefix and validation details.

steps.description: Type "not-a-url" into the URL input field
Verify element "red error" box is visible

title: Empty URL submission shows validation error banner
description: Verifies that submitting with an empty URL shows a red error box with an "Error:" prefix and a validation message.

steps.description: Verify element "red error" box is visible

title: Whitespace-only URL submission shows validation error banner
description: Verifies that submitting a whitespace-only URL results in a visible error banner indicating a validation failure.

steps.description: Type "   " into the URL input field
Verify element "red error" box is visible

title: Unsupported scheme (non-http/https) shows validation error banner
description: Verifies that a URL with an unsupported scheme triggers a validation error displayed in the red error banner.

steps.description: Type "ftp://example.com/article" into the URL input field
Verify element "red error" box is visible

title: Malformed URL format shows validation error banner
description: Verifies that a malformed URL format triggers the red error box with an "Error:" prefix and a validation message.

steps.description: Type "https://" into the URL input field
Verify element "red error" box is visible

title: Error banner updates when resubmitting with another invalid URL
description: Verifies that after an error is shown, submitting another invalid URL results in an error banner still visible and reflecting the latest validation messaging.

steps.description: Type "bad" into the URL input field
Type "still-not-a-url" into the URL input field

title: Error banner is not visible on initial page load
description: Verifies that the error state is not shown before any submission attempt.

steps.description: Verify element "URL input" field is visible
Verify element "red error" box is not visible

title: Summary Metrics Bar shows all three stat cards with numeric values after a successful analysis
description: Verifies that after submitting a valid article URL and analysis completion, the Ownership nodes, Author articles, and Active alerts cards display numeric values.

steps.description: Verify element "article URL input" is visible
Verify element "analysis loading spinner" is visible
Verify element "Ownership nodes value" is visible
Verify element "Author articles value" is visible

title: Summary Metrics Bar displays Active alerts value after analysis completion
description: Verifies the Active alerts stat card appears and its value area is visible after analysis finishes.

steps.description: Verify element "analysis loading spinner" is visible
Verify element "Active alerts value" is visible

title: Partial-data run shows at least one stat card with placeholder or Not available
description: Verifies that when analysis completes with partial data, one or more stat cards show a placeholder or "Not available" instead of a numeric value.

steps.description: Verify element "analysis loading spinner" is visible

title: Submitting with an empty URL does not show Summary Metrics Bar values
description: Verifies that without a submitted URL, the metrics bar does not present completed numeric values.

steps.description: Verify element "article URL input" is visible
Verify element "analysis loading spinner" is not visible
Verify text "Ownership nodes" is not visible
Verify text "Author articles" is not visible
Verify text "Active alerts" is not visible

title: Submitting an obviously invalid URL does not produce metric cards
description: Verifies that an invalid URL input does not lead to populated metrics cards being shown.

steps.description: Type "not a url" into the "article URL" field
Verify text "Not available" is not visible
Verify text "Ownership nodes" is not visible
Verify text "Author articles" is not visible
Verify text "Active alerts" is not visible

title: Metrics bar renders labels consistently after analysis completes
description: Verifies that after a completed analysis the three metrics labels are visible and correctly named.

steps.description: Verify element "analysis loading spinner" is visible
Verify element "Summary Metrics Bar" is visible

title: Layer 1 renders core fields after analyzing a valid article URL
description: Verifies that Layer 1 panel appears with Media Outlet heading and core fields (Domain, Title, Ownership chain, Summary) after analysis completes.

steps.description: Verify element "article URL input" is visible
Verify element "analysis loading spinner" is visible

title: Layer 1 Domain value is displayed (non-empty)
description: Verifies that the Domain field is present and shows a visible value after analysis completes.

steps.description: Verify element "Domain field value" is visible

title: Layer 1 Title value is displayed (matches article title text presence)
description: Verifies that the Title field is present and shows a visible title value after analysis completes.

steps.description: Verify element "Title field value" is visible

title: Layer 1 Ownership chain displays either arrow-separated values or 'Not found'
description: Verifies that the Ownership chain field is present and renders a visible value, allowing for fallback text.

steps.description: Verify element "Ownership chain field value" is visible

title: Layer 1 Summary field is visible after analysis completes
description: Verifies that the Summary field appears in Layer 1 and displays visible summary content.

steps.description: Verify element "Summary field content" is visible

title: Layer 1 does not show MBFC badge area when MBFC is unavailable (omitted UI)
description: Verifies that no MBFC badge area is displayed when MBFC_API_KEY is not set or the domain is not indexed.

title: Layer 1 input validation: submitting an empty URL does not start analysis
description: Verifies the user cannot run analysis with an empty URL and that Layer 1 results are not displayed.

steps.description: Verify element "article URL input" is visible
Verify element "analysis loading spinner" is not visible

title: Layer 1 input validation: invalid URL format is rejected and results do not render
description: Verifies that an obviously invalid URL does not proceed to analysis and Layer 1 panel does not appear.

steps.description: Type "not a url" into "article URL input"
Verify element "analysis loading spinner" is not visible

title: Author Panel renders for an article that includes author metadata
description: Verifies Layer 2 appears after analysis and displays populated author details when author metadata exists.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/article-with-author" into the article URL input field
Verify element "Loading" or an analysis spinner is visible
Verify element "Author" field value is visible and is not empty
Verify element "Coverage pattern" field is visible

title: Biography displays when present for an authored article
description: Verifies the Biography field is shown and contains visible content when the provider returns a biography.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/article-with-author-and-bio" into the article URL input field
Verify element "Biography" section contains visible text

title: Biography section gracefully handles missing biography for authored article
description: Verifies the Author Panel does not break when biography is absent and shows an empty or not-available state.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/article-with-author-no-bio" into the article URL input field
Verify element "Author" field value is visible and is not empty
Verify text "Not available" is visible in the "Biography" section

title: Articles list renders with source labels for an authored article
description: Verifies Layer 2 shows a non-empty article list and each entry displays a source label when available.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/article-with-author-and-articles" into the article URL input field
Verify at least one article entry is visible in the list
Verify a source label is visible for an article entry

title: Clicking an article link from the Author Panel is possible (link appears clickable)
description: Verifies article links are present and can be activated from Layer 2 without breaking the app UI.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/article-with-author-and-articles" into the article URL input field
Scroll to the "Articles" list in Layer 2
Verify an article link is visible in the list
Click the first visible article link

title: Author Panel handles articles with no author metadata
description: Verifies Layer 2 shows an explicit not-found/empty state when author metadata is missing.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/article-without-author" into the article URL input field
Verify text "Not found" is visible in the Author field area
Verify text "Not available" is visible in the Biography area

title: No-author article shows empty or not-available articles list state
description: Verifies the articles section gracefully shows an empty list or not-available messaging when no author is detected.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/article-without-author" into the article URL input field
Verify element "Articles" list section is visible
Verify text "Not available" is visible in the Articles section

title: Layer 2.5 renders after successful analysis with author root node visible
description: Verifies the Author Coverage Map section appears after submitting a valid article URL and analysis completes.

steps.description: Verify element "URL input field" is visible
Verify element "analysis loading spinner" is visible
Verify text "Author Coverage Map" is visible
Verify element "author name root node" is visible

title: Topic branches show article count badges in the topic tree
description: Verifies topic branches and their article-count badges are visible within Layer 2.5 after analysis completes.

steps.description: Verify text "Author Coverage Map" is visible
Verify element "topic branch item" is visible
Verify element "article count badge" is visible
Verify element "topic branch item" is visible

title: Expand a topic branch to reveal article links
description: Verifies expanding a topic branch reveals article links under that branch.

steps.description: Verify text "Author Coverage Map" is visible
Click on a "topic branch" in the topic tree
Verify element "article link under expanded topic branch" is visible
Verify element "expanded topic branch" is visible

title: Collapse an expanded topic branch hides article links
description: Verifies collapsing the same topic branch hides its previously revealed article links.

steps.description: Verify text "Author Coverage Map" is visible
Click on a "topic branch" in the topic tree
Verify element "article link under expanded topic branch" is visible
Click on the same "topic branch" again
Verify element "topic branch collapsed state" is visible

title: Bar chart is visible with topic distribution alongside the topic tree
description: Verifies the horizontal bar chart appears on the right and shows topic distribution values/bars after analysis completes.

steps.description: Verify text "Author Coverage Map" is visible
Verify element "topic distribution bar chart" is visible
Verify element "bar in topic distribution chart" is visible
Verify element "topic label in bar chart" is visible

title: Layer 2.5 supports minimal/absent author coverage data with a clear empty state
description: Verifies a clear message or empty state is shown when author coverage data is absent or minimal.

steps.description: Verify text "Author Coverage Map" is visible
Verify element "empty topic tree" is visible

title: Layer 2.5 remains visible and stable after toggling multiple branches
description: Verifies repeated expand/collapse interactions do not remove the section and the UI remains usable.

steps.description: Verify text "Author Coverage Map" is visible
Click on a "topic branch" in the topic tree
Click on a different "topic branch" in the topic tree
Click on the first "topic branch" again

title: Layer 2.5 section is discoverable by scrolling after analysis completes
description: Verifies the user can scroll to find the Layer 2.5 section and it is visible on the page.

steps.description: Verify element "analysis loading spinner" is visible
Verify text "Author Coverage Map" is visible

title: Layer 3 renders contrast paragraph after successful analysis
description: Verifies that submitting a valid article URL produces a visible Layer 3 Contrast panel with a generated paragraph.

steps.description: Verify element "URL" input field is visible
Verify element "Analyzing" spinner or loading indicator is visible
Wait for the "Layer 3" tag to appear
Verify element "Contrast analysis" paragraph content is visible

title: Layer 3 heading and tag are present even if contrast content is unavailable
description: Verifies that the Layer 3 Contrast section still renders with a fallback message when the LLM contrast result is not available.

steps.description: Wait for the "Layer 3" tag to appear

title: Layer 3 appears after analysis completes (no premature Layer 3 content)
description: Verifies that Layer 3 content is not shown before analysis completion and appears afterward.

steps.description: Verify element "Analyzing" spinner or loading indicator is visible
Wait for the "Layer 3" tag to appear

title: Layer 3 Contrast panel remains readable after scrolling
description: Verifies the Layer 3 section is visible and readable when the user scrolls the results page.

steps.description: Wait for the "Layer 3" tag to appear
Verify element "Contrast analysis" paragraph content is visible

title: Re-running analysis updates Layer 3 content for a different URL
description: Verifies that submitting a second URL replaces/updates the Layer 3 contrast output rather than leaving stale content.

steps.description: Wait for the "Layer 3" tag to appear
Wait for the "Layer 3" tag to appear

title: Layer 4 renders divergence score, progress bar, interpretation, counts, and divergent sources for a valid article URL
description: Verifies the Narrative Divergence panel shows a numeric score (0–100) with supporting UI and a populated divergent sources list after analysis completes.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/story" into the article URL input field
Click on the button to submit the article for analysis
Wait for the analysis results to appear
Verify a numeric divergence score is visible and looks like a value from 0 to 100
Verify the divergence progress bar is visible

title: Layer 4 shows interpretation text for a computed divergence score
description: Verifies an interpretation/explanation is shown in the Narrative Divergence panel when a numeric score is available.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/another-story" into the article URL input field
Click on the button to submit the article for analysis
Wait for the analysis results to appear
Verify the interpretation text explaining the score range is visible

title: Layer 4 shows global and author snippet counts when analysis succeeds
description: Verifies snippet count fields are visible in the Narrative Divergence panel after analysis completes.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/coverage" into the article URL input field
Click on the button to submit the article for analysis
Wait for the analysis results to appear
Verify the global snippet count is visible
Verify the author snippet count is visible

title: Layer 4 lists most divergent sources with score badges and links when available
description: Verifies the most divergent sources section displays at least one source row with a score badge and a visible link.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/politics" into the article URL input field
Click on the button to submit the article for analysis
Wait for the analysis results to appear
Verify the list of most divergent sources is visible
Verify at least one divergent source shows a score badge and a clickable link

title: Layer 4 gracefully shows "Not available" when embeddings/divergence cannot be computed
description: Verifies the panel renders with a "Not available" score and no divergent sources when the embeddings provider is unavailable or fails.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/embeddings-fail" into the article URL input field
Click on the button to submit the article for analysis
Wait for the analysis results to appear
Verify text "Not available" is visible for the divergence score
Verify the divergent sources list is empty or no divergent sources are shown

title: Submitting an invalid URL does not show Layer 4 Narrative Divergence results
description: Verifies that an invalid URL submission does not produce the Narrative Divergence panel results (analysis should not complete successfully).

steps.description: Type "not-a-url" into the article URL input field
Click on the button to submit the article for analysis
Verify text "Narrative Divergence" is not visible

title: Bias Alerts panel renders with at least one alert after analyzing a valid URL
description: Verifies that the Alerts section appears after analysis and shows one or more alerts with severity, code, and message.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/article" into the article URL input field
Verify element "Loading" or an analysis spinner is visible
Wait for the "Bias Alerts Detected" heading to appear
Verify text "Bias Alerts Detected" is visible
Verify at least one alert item is visible

title: Each displayed alert includes a severity badge label (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW)
description: Verifies that any alert shown includes a visible severity badge label.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/article" into the article URL input field
Wait for the "Bias Alerts Detected" heading to appear
Verify at least one of the texts "HIGH", "MEDIUM", or "LOW" is visible within an alert severity badge
Verify an alert item is visible
Verify the severity badge is visible within the alert item

title: Alert code text is visible for an alert item
description: Verifies that an alert code label/text is displayed for at least one alert.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/article" into the article URL input field
Wait for the "Bias Alerts Detected" heading to appear
Verify at least one alert item is visible
Verify element "Alert code" (or equivalent code label/value text within an alert) is visible

title: Alert message text is visible for an alert item
description: Verifies that a human-readable alert message is displayed for at least one alert.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/article" into the article URL input field
Wait for the "Bias Alerts Detected" heading to appear
Verify at least one alert item is visible
Verify element "Alert message" (or equivalent message text within an alert) is visible

title: No-alerts scenario shows Alerts section with an empty state message or empty list
description: Verifies that when no deterministic rules fire, the Alerts section still appears and indicates no alerts.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/neutral-article" into the article URL input field
Wait for the "Bias Alerts Detected" heading to appear
Verify text "Bias Alerts Detected" is visible
Verify text indicating no alerts detected is visible, or verify that no alert items are visible

title: Alerts panel remains visible after scrolling through results
description: Verifies the Alerts section can be reached and remains readable when the user scrolls results.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/article" into the article URL input field
Wait for the "Bias Alerts Detected" heading to appear
Scroll to the "Bias Alerts Detected" heading
Verify text "Bias Alerts Detected" is visible
Verify the alerts list area is visible

title: Re-running analysis refreshes the Alerts content for a different URL
description: Verifies that submitting a second URL updates the Alerts panel content (alerts present vs no alerts).

steps.description: Type "https://example.com/news/article" into the article URL input field
Wait for the "Bias Alerts Detected" heading to appear
Verify the Alerts section is visible
Type "https://example.com/news/neutral-article" into the article URL input field
Wait for the "Bias Alerts Detected" heading to appear

title: Alerts section is not shown before running analysis
description: Verifies that the Bias Alerts panel is not prematurely displayed on initial load before submission.

steps.description: Verify text "Bias Alerts Detected" is not visible
Type "https://example.com/news/article" into the article URL input field
Wait for the "Bias Alerts Detected" heading to appear
Verify text "Bias Alerts Detected" is visible

title: Raw JSON Inspector is collapsed by default after a successful analysis
description: Verifies the Raw JSON section appears after analysis and is collapsed by default.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com" into the article URL field
Verify element "Raw JSON" JSON content area is not visible

title: Expand Raw JSON to view JSON in a scrollable preformatted block
description: Verifies expanding Raw JSON reveals JSON content displayed in a preformatted block.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com" into the article URL field
Verify element "Raw JSON" JSON content area is visible

title: Collapse Raw JSON after expanding hides the JSON content
description: Verifies the Raw JSON section can be collapsed again after expansion.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com" into the article URL field
Verify element "Raw JSON" JSON content area is visible
Verify element "Raw JSON" JSON content area is not visible

title: Raw JSON remains available and expandable after a long analysis wait
description: Verifies the Raw JSON inspector is still usable when analysis takes longer and the user waits for completion.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com" into the article URL field
Wait for element "Raw JSON" to appear
Verify element "Raw JSON" JSON content area is visible

title: Raw JSON inspector displays empty arrays/object placeholders when integrations return no data
description: Verifies the Raw JSON output can show empty arrays and placeholder objects without breaking the inspector UI.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com" into the article URL field
Wait for element "Raw JSON" to appear

title: Raw JSON summary remains visible and clickable after toggling multiple times
description: Verifies the Raw JSON inspector remains stable and interactive after repeated expand/collapse toggles.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com" into the article URL field
Wait for element "Raw JSON" to appear
Verify element "Raw JSON" JSON content area is visible

title: Header displays HUGINN branding and Live Analysis badge on initial load
description: Verifies the sticky header shows the HUGINN title/subtitle and the "Live Analysis" badge on the home route.

title: Footer content and external links are visible after scrolling
description: Verifies the footer is reachable via scroll and shows copyright text plus GitHub and X links.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the page

title: Sticky header remains visible after scrolling down the page
description: Verifies the header stays visible when the user scrolls away from the top (sticky behavior validated via visibility).

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the page

title: GitHub link is present and can be clicked from the footer
description: Verifies the GitHub link is visible in the footer and can be clicked without breaking the app UI flow.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the page
Click on "GitHub" link in the footer

title: X link is present and can be clicked from the footer
description: Verifies the X (Twitter) link is visible in the footer and initiates navigation to an external site.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the page
Click on "X" link in the footer
